title: Noesis v1.5 first-party release gate + ICC oracle
goal: Treat Noesis as the first-party Eshkol v1.5 intelligence layer. Add a release gate that runs the Noesis v1.5 gate suite from Eshkol orchestration, and register a real ICC attempt-eval/oracle so readiness has runtime evidence instead of only static/generic readiness.
acceptance: Eshkol-side script runs Noesis gate_v1_5_intelligence, learned_encoder, semantic_unify, recursive, session, and live_agent gates
ICC readiness for the Noesis v1.5 target has passing runtime attempt-eval evidence
Noesis remains first-party but optional to the self-contained Eshkol core lane
